posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey community!

Do you ever get stuck trying to figure out how to utilize the Connect Boards columns? Or are you super familiar with this feature but just wish you could automate the process of linking your boards instead of manually setting it up every time?

Good news! This short video will walk you through setting up the Connect Boards column both manually and via match automations!

In this use case, we show how you might want to utilize Connect Boards columns for boards where you have the same list of guests or clients on each, and you don’t want to manually enter the same information each time.

What kinds of workflows do you use your Connect Boards columns and match automations for?

Check out the video and let us know what you think!
